summary: Iteration 11 resolves all figure-text consistency issues. PMP-WD removed from all figures. Title no longer overclaims causation. Structural issues remain: no ImageNet, N=3 seeds, CSI zero predictive value, missing proof appendix.

findings.description: ImageNet experiments absent after 7+ iterations. Project constraints mandate ImageNet.
findings.suggestion: Run ImageNet-100 with 3 methods x 3 seeds x ResNet-50 = 9 runs.

findings.description: N=3 seeds gives 15-20% TOST power. Only 6/12 comparisons pass equivalence at delta=1.0%.
findings.suggestion: Add 2 seeds for key methods to reach N=5.

findings.description: CSI uses arbitrary weights with rho<0.3 correlation to accuracy. Listed as contribution but has no predictive utility.
Paper references Appendix A but no appendix exists. 6th consecutive iteration.
findings.suggestion: Remove appendix references or provide proof sketches.

findings.description: Section 5.7 alignment analysis reports non-significant correlations honestly but occupies significant space for a null finding.
